title: Verifier Result Schema
description: Strict JSON the LLM verifier (Codex CLI in plan v4.2) returns. The dispatcher's 'schema-or-die' wrapper validates this output before acting; on parse failure the dispatcher retries once with a stricter prompt, then emits verdict='human' with reason='verifier_output_unparseable'. See ~/.claude/plans/verifier-pair-infrastructure-v1.md (Layer 3).

schema_version.description: v1 is additive-only. Unsupported major versions rejected at load time.

verdict.description: pass: no findings, builder continues. feedback: low-risk fixes; auto-continuation depends on lane's compliance_class. block: builder must address findings before next turn. human: escalate, do not retry. Compliance-classed lanes (audit/child-data/auth/ferpa/coppa) MUST always escalate to human; the dispatcher rejects feedback verdicts on those lanes per the routing table.

lane_id.description: Echoed from the claim ledger so the dispatcher can reconcile.

ledger_turn_id.description: Echoed from the claim ledger; lets the dispatcher associate this verdict with the right bundle.

findings.description: Atomic findings. Empty array on verdict='pass'. Non-empty on feedback/block/human.

claim_id.description: Index into ledger.acceptance_claims that this finding contradicts. Omit for findings unrelated to a specific claim.

suggested_action.description: Per-finding routing hint. The verdict aggregates these (highest severity wins).

rationale.description: Short, redaction-safe summary. Never includes raw user PII or fixture content.

reason.description: Used with verdict='human'. Standard values: claim_ledger_missing_or_invalid, verifier_output_unparseable, daily_cost_cap_exceeded, verifier_unreachable_compliance_lane.
